entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnuts, first recorded in India in 1949, causing significant economic loss.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where peanut bud necrosis disease was first recorded and is economically important.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The agricultural crop affected by peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: A state in India where peanut bud necrosis disease is economically important.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India where peanut bud necrosis disease is economically important.

entities.description: A state in India where peanut bud necrosis disease is economically important.

entities.description: A state in India where peanut bud necrosis disease is economically important.

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where peanut bud necrosis disease is economically important.

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus previously reported as the cause of peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.name: TOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: A genus of viruses to which the peanut bud necrosis virus belongs.

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: The causal virus of peanut bud necrosis disease in India, a serologically distinct tospovirus.

entities.name: THRIPS PALMI
entities.description: The insect vector that transmits the peanut bud necrosis virus.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where the peanut bud necrosis virus is restricted.

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A region where the peanut bud necrosis virus is restricted.

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management techniques used to control peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.name: FIELD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut cultivars to resist peanut bud necrosis disease in the field.

entities.name: PBNV GENOME
entities.description: The complete genetic material of the peanut bud necrosis virus.

entities.description: The types of RNA molecules found within the PBNV genome.

entities.description: The functional units of DNA/RNA within the PBNV genome.

entities.description: Tools used for the identification and detection of peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.description: Resistance to PBND developed through genetic engineering.

entities.description: The study of the distribution and determinants of peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.description: Groundnut varieties that mature early and possess resistance to PBND.
